# sirr.dev — Sirr Documentation Site

Documentation website for Sirr — the ephemeral secret vault.
Next.js + MDX, 10 languages, deployed at https://sirr.dev

## Pages

- / — Home
- /quickstart — Get started in 5 minutes
- /quickstart/solo-dev — Single-user self-hosted setup
- /quickstart/devops — DevOps team setup with patchable secrets
- /quickstart/multi-team — Multi-tenant org setup
- /api-reference — HTTP API reference
- /cli — CLI reference (push, set, get, pull, run, list, delete, prune, audit)
- /sdks — SDK overview (Node.js, Python, .NET)
- /mcp — MCP server reference (push_secret, set_secret, get_secret)
- /self-hosting — Deployment and configuration
- /security — Security model and encryption
- /licensing — License tiers and keys

## Languages

English (en), Arabic (ar, RTL), Japanese (ja), Spanish (es), French (fr),
German (de), Portuguese (pt), Chinese (zh), Korean (ko), Hindi (hi)

## Stack

Next.js 16, MDX, Tailwind CSS 4, FlexSearch (client-side search), Framer Motion

## Source

github.com/sirrlock/sirr.dev
